prompt:
A single 9 V alkaline battery stands upright on a neutral work surface, with its two snap terminals clearly visible on the top. The casing is a simple two-tone design with no readable branding or text, emphasizing that it is a generic 6F22 9 V cell intended for electronics projects and test equipment. Nearby, a small multimeter and a breadboard with a few jumper wires hint at its typical use powering small circuits and handheld tools.

The scene is set in a near-future solarpunk electronics nook with soft, even lighting, a plant on a nearby shelf, and neatly organized components in the blurred background. The 512×512 image is photorealistic with gentle stylization, no logos or legible writing on the battery or tools, and a composition that keeps the 9 V battery and its terminals as the focal point while the surrounding workspace remains softly out of focus.
